title: TLA+ MAS Coordination Protocol IR v3 (PlusCal)
description: Intermediate Representation for coordination protocols between independent concurrent agents. Defines agents, shared resources, and message channels. Agent behavior is written as PlusCal process bodies (not JSON states).

agents.description: Independent agent processes. Each runs concurrently as a PlusCal process.

tools.description: Optional: available tools for this agent. Ignored by TLA+ verification, used by execution runtime.

resources.description: Shared resources that agents compete for. Lock = exclusive access, Counter = counting semaphore.

initial.description: Initial counter value. Required for Counter type.

channels.description: Unbounded FIFO message channels between agents. Send always succeeds; receive blocks if empty.

from.description: Agent(s) allowed to send on this channel.

to.description: Agent(s) allowed to receive from this channel.

labels.description: Message types that flow through this channel. All send/receive operations on this channel must use one of these labels.

content_labels.description: Optional subset of `labels` that carry BUSINESS CONTENT (data-plane; IGNORED by TLA+/TLC — not part of the verified model). On these labels the runtime opens a scoped content handle (a claim-check ref into the ConversationStore); every other label is a pure coordination signal and the content channel stays CLOSED. E.g. ['revise'] when 'accept' needs no payload but 'revise' carries reviewer suggestions.

state_tasks.description: Optional per-state BUSINESS-task descriptions (observability only; IGNORED by TLA+/TLC — not part of the verified model). Keys are PlusCal state ids (e.g. 'PLOTTER_write'); values are short prose describing the domain work to do at that state. Injected into states.json as each state's `task` field, used for runtime prompts + phase monitoring.

agent_resources.description: Optional planner metadata mapping agent ids to resource ids. Ignored by TLA+/TLC.

tool_resource_map.description: Optional planner/runtime metadata mapping tool or action names to resource ids. Ignored by TLA+/TLC.
